name: Founder OS - Website Form Intake

meta.description: Optional n8n augmentation for website lead notifications. Canonical CRM sync runs in marketing API (syncLeadToProspects).

primaryPipeline.note: Do not duplicate prospect inserts in n8n unless using a separate notification-only branch.

steps: Validate payload shape from website lead source.
Check existing prospect by email (idempotent upsert — do not create duplicates).
If using notification-only mode: skip CRM insert and notify founder.
If using legacy standalone mode: insert or update prospects with source=website_form and stage=identified.
Insert outreach_activity with activity_type=identified and channel=website when CRM write is enabled.
Send optional founder notification (email or Slack).
guardrails: Do not replace existing website form pipeline.
Use idempotent matching on email to avoid duplicates.
Prefer marketing API prospect-sync as source of truth for CRM rows.
